headline: Agentic coding tooling led the week as Moonshot AI shipped the trillion-parameter Kimi K2.7 Code model with a terminal-based CLI.
body: Kimi K2.7 Code arrived as an open-source Mixture-of-Experts coding model paired with a CLI for repository exploration, file editing, and test execution, anchoring tool calling and code generation as the dominant rotation. Practitioner attention concentrated on agentic workflows around Claude Code, including an "Agentic OS" framework built on skills and memory management, plus reports on how code style drives token costs. The AI Engineer World's Fair 2026 ran across three days at Moscone West, while Anthropic publicly accused Alibaba of illicitly extracting AI capabilities, raising distillation and model-compression questions. Europe pushed back on U.S. semiconductor export controls, with ASML noting current Chinese access is limited to older deep ultraviolet lithography tools.

cited_items.title: Kimi K2.7 Code: THIS is VERY CRAZY MAN!
